# viettelidc_vks_cluster (Data Source)

Data source for VKS Cluster lookup.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tra cá»©u K8s Cluster
data "viettelidc_vks_cluster" "main" {
  id = "1477"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the Cluster.

### Read-Only

- `endpoint` (String) API endpoint.
- `name` (String) Name of the Cluster.
- `status` (String) Status of the Cluster.
- `version` (String) Kubernetes version.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID of the Cluster.
